What we do

Complete roofing services

From a single slipped tile to a full re-roof, Redline Roofing & Homes handles every part of your roof with quality materials and a tidy, professional finish.

New Roofs & Re-Roofing

Full roof replacements built to last, using premium tiles, slates and modern breathable membranes.

Roof Repairs

Leaks, slipped or broken tiles and storm damage put right quickly — with honest advice on what actually needs doing.

Flat & Felt Roofing

Hard-wearing flat roof systems for extensions, garages and dormers, sealed to keep the weather out for good.

Dry Verge & Dry Ridge

Modern, mortar-free verge and ridge systems for a secure, low-maintenance finish that meets current standards.

Chimneys & Repointing

Chimney repairs, rebuilds, lead flashing and repointing to stop damp and keep your roofline watertight.

Fascias, Soffits & Guttering

uPVC fascias, soffits and seamless guttering — protecting your home and finishing the roof off cleanly.

The difference

Before & after

Watch a real Redline project come back to life — from tired and weathered to watertight and built to last.

Before → After
Featured project

Full Roof Replacement — Evesham

This weathered, moss-bound roof was stripped right back and rebuilt from the deck up — new breathable membrane, treated battens and fresh interlocking tiles, finished with clean dry-verge edges. The result is a sharp, watertight roof built to shrug off whatever Worcestershire weather throws at it.

  • Complete strip & re-roof, start to finish
  • New membrane, battens & tiles throughout
  • Fully guaranteed, left clean and tidy

Why Redline

Roofers you can rely on

We're a local, family-run team that treats every roof like it's our own — straight talking, fair priced and finished to a standard we're proud to put our name on.

Local & established

Based right here in Evesham

Known faces in the area, covering the Vale of Evesham and across Worcestershire. We're never far away if you need us.

Insured & guaranteed

Cover & a 10-year guarantee

Fully insured and standing behind our workmanship with a 10-year guarantee, so you can have complete peace of mind.

Honest advice

No hard sell, ever

We'll tell you what your roof actually needs — a repair if a repair will do. Free quotes with clear, itemised pricing.

Quality first

Right materials, no shortcuts

Trusted, recognised products and proper detailing. We do it once and we do it properly — and we leave your property spotless.

Reliable

We turn up when we say

Clear communication from quote to completion, work scheduled around you, and a team that respects your home and your time.

Any size job

Repairs to full re-roofs

No job too big or too small — from a single emergency repair to complete roofing projects on homes and commercial properties.

Meet the team

A roofing firm built on doing it right

Redline Roofing & Homes Ltd is a local, family-run roofing company based in Evesham, serving homeowners and businesses right across the Vale and the wider Worcestershire area.

We started out with a simple idea: roofing done honestly, to a high standard, at a fair price — no cut corners and no surprises. From emergency repairs to full re-roofs, fascias and chimneys, every job gets the same care and attention, and we don't leave until you're happy.

Our fleet of fully-branded vehicles and experienced team mean we can take on work of any size while keeping things friendly and personal.

[Owner name]Owner & Founder, Redline Roofing & Homes Ltd
